source: AD&D 2nd Edition Dungeon Master's Guide, Arms & Equipment Guide
description: Magic item tables, descriptions, and properties. Includes potions, scrolls, rings, rods/staves/wands, miscellaneous magic, and magic weapons/armor.

identification_methods: Identify spell (wizard 1st level): reveals properties of one item; requires a pearl worth 100 gp consumed
Legend Lore spell: reveals history and use of powerful items
Trial and error: attempting to use the item; dangerous with unknown curses
Detect Magic: shows that an item is magical but not what it does
identification_rules.attunement: AD&D 2e does not use attunement; most items are immediately usable unless specified
identification_rules.charges: Wands, staves, and some rods have charges. Items with 0 charges become nonmagical.

cursed_items.description: Cursed items cannot be discarded without Remove Curse or similar magic
cursed_items.detection: Cursed items rarely radiate evil; often only identified by use or specific divination
cursed_items.removal: Remove Curse (3rd level priest spell or 4th level wizard) allows item to be discarded

potions.description: Single-use magical liquids; effect lasts 1d6+2 turns unless specified; drinking takes 1 segment
potions.mixing_potions: Mixing two potions causes a random effect (explosion, neutralization, random potion, etc.) — DM determines

items.name: Potion of Animal Control
items.description: Controls 1d4+1 animals of a specific type (roll separately for type). Animals obey mental commands. Lasts 1d6+2 turns.

items.name: Potion of Clairaudience
items.description: Hear through walls and doors at a chosen location within 30 yards. Lasts 1d6+2 turns.

items.name: Potion of Clairvoyance
items.description: See through walls and doors at a chosen location within 30 yards. Lasts 1d6+2 turns.

items.name: Potion of Climbing
items.description: Climb at full movement rate on any surface. Lasts 1d6+2 turns.

items.name: Potion of Delusion
items.description: Cursed. Drinker believes it is a random beneficial potion; no actual effect.

items.name: Potion of Diminution
items.description: Shrinks drinker to 6 inches tall. Equipment also shrinks. Lasts 2d6 turns.

items.name: Potion of Dragon Control
items.description: Controls one dragon of a specific type (roll d10 for type). Dragon must obey commands. Lasts 5d4 rounds.

items.name: Potion of ESP
items.description: Functions as ESP spell. Can read surface thoughts of one creature within 60 ft. Lasts 1d6+2 turns.

items.name: Potion of Extra Healing
items.description: Restores 3d8+3 HP. Instantly consumed. Three doses per bottle.

items.name: Potion of Fire Breath
items.description: Exhale fire as a cone 5 ft wide and 30 ft long for 6d6 damage (save vs. breath weapon for half). One use only.

items.name: Potion of Fire Resistance
items.description: Complete immunity to normal fire; +4 saves vs. magical fire; half damage from magical fire even on failed save. Lasts 1d6+2 turns.

items.name: Potion of Flying
items.description: Fly at movement rate 18 (MC: B). Lasts 1d6+2 turns.

items.name: Potion of Gaseous Form
items.description: Body becomes gas, immune to weapon damage, can seep through small cracks. Lasts 1d6+2 turns.

items.name: Potion of Giant Control
items.description: Controls 1-2 giants of a specific type for 5d4 rounds. They obey all commands.

items.name: Potion of Giant Strength
items.description: Grants strength of a specific giant type (roll for type). Lasts 1d6+2 turns.

items.name: Potion of Growth
items.description: Doubles drinker's height and multiplies weight by 8. Equipment also grows. Lasts 2d6 turns.

items.name: Potion of Healing
items.description: Restores 2d4+2 HP. Instantly consumed. Can be split into three doses of 1d4 each.

items.name: Potion of Heroism
items.description: Non-warriors gain temporary levels (see table). Warriors gain +2 to attack/damage, +10 HP. Lasts 1d6+2 turns.

items.name: Potion of Human Control
items.description: Functions as Charm Person on up to 32 levels/HD of humans, demi-humans, or humanoids. Lasts 5d6 rounds.

items.name: Potion of Infravision
items.description: Grants 60-ft infravision. Lasts 1d6+2 turns.

items.name: Potion of Invisibility
items.description: Grants Invisibility as per spell. Broken by attacking or casting spells. Lasts 1 hour.

items.name: Potion of Invulnerability
items.description: +2 to AC and saves. Immune to non-magical weapons. Lasts 1d6+2 turns. Can only be used once per week.

items.name: Potion of Levitation
items.description: Levitate vertically as per Levitate spell. Lasts 1d6+2 turns.

items.name: Potion of Longevity
items.description: Reduces apparent age by 1d12 years. Each use has 1% cumulative chance of rapid aging instead.

items.name: Potion of Oil of Etherealness
items.description: Drinker and up to 300 lbs of equipment enters Ethereal Plane. Lasts 1d6+2 turns.

items.name: Potion of Oil of Slipperiness
items.description: Applied to body: immune to grappling, allows escape from bonds. Applied to floor: all crossing save vs. spell or fall.

items.name: Potion of Philter of Love
items.description: Drinker falls deeply in love with the first creature seen. Save vs. spell negates. Lasts 1d6 days.

items.name: Potion of Philter of Persuasiveness
items.description: +25% to Bard's Persuasion ability; others gain suggestion power once per turn. Lasts 1d6+2 turns.

items.name: Potion of Plant Control
items.description: Control ambulatory plants in 20x20 ft area. Lasts 1d6+2 turns.

items.name: Potion of Poison
items.description: Cursed. Deals 1d6+4 damage on the next attack made by someone who touches the liquid.

items.name: Potion of Polymorph Self
items.description: Functions as Polymorph Self spell. Lasts 2d6 turns.

items.name: Potion of Rainbow Hues
items.description: Drinker can change their coloring at will, functioning as Chameleon Power. Lasts 2d4 rounds.

items.name: Potion of Speed
items.description: Doubles movement; +1 additional attack per round. Ages drinker 1 year. Lasts 1d6+2 turns.

items.name: Potion of Super-Heroism
items.description: As Heroism but stronger. Warriors gain +4 to attack/damage, +20 HP, and fight with berserk fury. Non-warriors see Heroism +1 level.

items.name: Potion of Sweet Water
items.description: Purifies 10 cubic feet of water when poured in.

items.name: Potion of Treasure Finding
items.description: Detects the direction of the largest treasure hoard within 240 yards. Lasts 1d6 turns.

items.name: Potion of Undead Control
items.description: Controls 1d4+4 undead as per Command Undead. Undead types determined by d6+1.

items.name: Potion of Water Breathing
items.description: Breathe water as air. Lasts 1d6+2 turns.

scrolls.description: Single-use magical writings; spell scrolls can be cast by appropriate class without preparation

protection_scrolls.name: Protection from Demons
protection_scrolls.description: No demon of 7 HD or fewer can approach within 10 ft. Lasts 5d4 rounds for one person, 2d4 rounds for 10-ft radius.

protection_scrolls.name: Protection from Devils
protection_scrolls.description: As Protection from Demons but for devils.

protection_scrolls.name: Protection from Elementals
protection_scrolls.description: Specific elemental type cannot harm user. Lasts 5d4 rounds.

protection_scrolls.name: Protection from Lycanthropes
protection_scrolls.description: All lycanthropes within 10 ft must save vs. spell or flee. Lasts 5d4 rounds.

protection_scrolls.name: Protection from Magic
protection_scrolls.description: Complete immunity to all magical spells and effects within 5-ft radius. Lasts 5d6 rounds.

protection_scrolls.name: Protection from Petrification
protection_scrolls.description: Immune to petrification effects (gaze, touch, etc.). Lasts 5d4 rounds.

protection_scrolls.name: Protection from Plants
protection_scrolls.description: Ambulatory and attacking plants cannot attack user. Lasts 5d4 rounds.

protection_scrolls.name: Protection from Possession
protection_scrolls.description: Cannot be possessed by spirits, ghosts, mind control. Lasts 5d4 rounds.

protection_scrolls.name: Protection from Undead
protection_scrolls.description: Undead cannot attack user within 5 ft. Lasts 5d4 rounds.

protection_scrolls.name: Protection from Water
protection_scrolls.description: Water cannot harm user; immunity to water-based spells. Lasts 5d4 rounds.

spell_scrolls.description: Spell scrolls contain 1-7 spells. Any appropriate class can cast from them.
spell_scrolls.wizard_scrolls: Contain 1-7 wizard spells; any wizard, illusionist, or specialist can use
spell_scrolls.priest_scrolls: Contain 1-7 priest spells; any priest can use if spell is in their sphere

cursed_scrolls.name: Scroll of Stupidity
cursed_scrolls.description: Reduces INT by 3d4 points permanently (Remove Curse + Restoration to fix)

cursed_scrolls.name: Scroll of Insanity
cursed_scrolls.description: Inflicts random insanity (Remove Curse only cure)

cursed_scrolls.name: Scroll of the Wishing Well
cursed_scrolls.description: False wish scroll; causes opposite of desired effect

rings.description: Magical rings worn on fingers. Most are usable by any class. Can wear up to 2 rings with effect simultaneously.

items.name: Ring of Animal Friendship
items.description: Charm one animal (up to 2 HD) per round. Animals so charmed become permanent companions. Maximum 3 animals at once.

items.name: Ring of Blinking
items.description: As Blink spell; randomly blinks wearer during combat giving AC bonuses and 20% miss chance.

items.name: Ring of Chameleon Power
items.description: At will: appear as common creature/person. Stationary: 90% invisible to surprise. Moving: 60% invisible.

items.name: Ring of Clumsiness
items.description: Cursed. Reduces DEX to 3. 25% chance per action to drop held item.

items.name: Ring of Contrariness
items.description: Cursed. Wearer becomes contrary to all suggestions. Cannot be removed without Remove Curse.

items.name: Ring of Delusion
items.description: Cursed. Wearer believes the ring has the powers of a randomly determined beneficial ring.

items.name: Ring of Djinni Summoning
items.description: Summons a djinni to serve. Djinni obeys all commands for up to 1 hour per day.

items.name: Ring of Earth Elemental Command
items.description: Command earth elementals; +1 saves vs. earth; move through stone; pass through earth; +3 vs. earth attacks.

items.name: Ring of Elemental Command
items.description: Complete command over an elemental type (Air, Earth, Fire, Water). Also grants many elemental powers.

items.name: Ring of Feather Falling
items.description: Automatically triggers Feather Fall effect when wearer would fall. No action required.

items.name: Ring of Fire Elemental Command
items.description: Command fire elementals; fire does no damage; fire magic +2 to effects; -2 vs. cold; see in flames.

items.name: Ring of Fire Resistance
items.description: Completely immune to non-magical fire; +4 saves vs. magical fire; take half damage from magical fire even on failed save.

items.name: Ring of Free Action
items.description: Move freely underwater; unaffected by Slow and Hold spells; immune to paralysis and entanglement.

items.name: Ring of Invisibility
items.description: Become invisible at will. Ends if wearer attacks or casts a spell.

items.name: Ring of Jumping
items.description: Leap 30 ft horizontally and 9 ft vertically from standing position. 3 times per day.

items.name: Ring of Mammal Control
items.description: Charm up to 30 HD of mammals (not humans/demi-humans). Lasts while ring is worn and concentration held.

items.name: Ring of Mind Shielding
items.description: Immune to ESP, Detect Lie, Know Alignment, and similar mind-reading spells.

items.name: Ring of Plant Control
items.description: Control ambulatory or mobile plants in 20x20 ft area within 60 ft.

items.name: Ring of Protection +1 to +5
items.description: Bonus to AC and saving throws.

items.name: Ring of Regeneration
items.description: Regenerate 1 HP per round; regrow severed limbs in 1d6+5 days; save vs. death magic at +2.

items.name: Ring of Shooting Stars
items.description: In darkness: Faerie Fire and Spark Shower. Outdoors at night: Shooting Stars for 12d6 damage. 1/week.

items.name: Ring of Spell Storing
items.description: Stores up to 5 spell levels (from wizard or priest). Holder can cast stored spells using their own stats.

items.name: Ring of Spell Turning
items.description: Reflects 1d4+6 levels of spells back on caster. Charge-based; 3d6 charges; replenishes at dawn.

items.name: Ring of Sustenance
items.description: Eliminates need for food and water. Only 2 hours of sleep needed per day.

items.name: Ring of Swimming
items.description: Swim at movement rate 18; never tire from swimming; +4 to all swimming proficiency checks.

items.name: Ring of Telekinesis
items.description: Telekinesis as spell; 200 lbs capacity. Continuous while wearing. Concentration required.

items.name: Ring of Three Wishes
items.description: Contains 3 Wish spells usable by wearer. After all used, ring becomes non-magical.

items.name: Ring of Warmth
items.description: Wearer immune to cold up to 0°F; +4 saves vs. cold-based attacks. Stays comfortable in winter conditions.

items.name: Ring of Water Walking
items.description: Walk on water or other liquid surfaces as if solid ground.

items.name: Ring of Wizardry
items.description: Doubles memorized spells for a specific level.

items.name: Ring of X-Ray Vision
items.description: See through up to 10 ft of wood, 5 ft of stone, 1 inch of metal per round. Cannot see through gold/lead. Extended use causes STR and CON drain.

rods.name: Rod of Absorption
rods.description: Absorbs spells directed at wielder; absorbed energy can fuel wielder's spells. Holds max 50 spell levels; when full, becomes nonmagical.

rods.name: Rod of Beguiling
rods.description: All creatures within 30 ft must save vs. spell at -4 or be charmed. 1 charge per use. 50 charges.

rods.name: Rod of Cancellation
rods.description: Single use. Touch a magic item to drain it of all powers permanently. The rod itself is consumed.

rods.name: Rod of Flailing
rods.description: Functions as flail +3/+3 with a +4 bonus to AC and saves when used two-handed.

rods.name: Rod of Lordly Might
rods.description: Combination weapon/tool with 6 functions: +2 mace, +1 sword, battle axe, climbing pole, 10-ft ladder, +5 mace 3/day.

rods.name: Rod of Passage
rods.description: 5 functions each usable once per day: Astral travel, Dimension Door, Passwall, Phase Door, Teleport Without Error.

rods.name: Rod of Resurrection
rods.description: Raises dead with no Constitution loss. Restores to full HP. 1 charge each use (race varies charge cost). 5 maximum charges; rechargeable by clerics.

rods.name: Rod of Rulership
rods.description: Commands all creatures with fewer than 12 HD within 120 ft. Save vs. spell negates. Lasts 5d4 rounds. 25 charges.

rods.name: Rod of Security
rods.description: Transports wielder and up to 199 others to a pocket paradise. Time passes at 1/1000 normal rate. 200-day total use.

rods.name: Rod of Smiting
rods.description: +3 mace vs. all creatures; +6 vs. constructs and golems; can shatter constructs' armor on hit.

rods.name: Rod of Terror
rods.description: Fear cone 60 ft long, 20 ft wide. All in area save vs. spell at -2 or flee for 1d4+1 rounds. 25 charges.

rods.name: Rod of Withering
rods.description: Touch attack; deals 1d4 STR and 1d4 CON damage per hit. Damage is permanent until Restoration cast.

staves.name: Staff of Command
staves.description: Functions: Charm Animal (1 charge), Charm Person (1), Hold Animal (2), Hold Person (2), Hold Plant (4). 50 charges.

staves.name: Staff of Curing
staves.description: Cleric spell staff. Functions: Cure Blindness (1), Cure Disease (2), Cure Light Wounds (1), Cure Serious Wounds (2), Cure Critical Wounds (3), Remove Curse (3), Slow Poison (1), Neutralize Poison (3). 50 charges.

staves.name: Staff of Fire
staves.description: Burning Hands (1), Fireball (2), Wall of Fire (2). 50 charges. Usable only by wizards.

staves.name: Staff of Frost
staves.description: Cone of Cold (5), Ice Storm (4), Wall of Ice (4). 50 charges. Usable by wizards only.

staves.name: Staff of Healing
staves.description: Cure Light Wounds (1), Cure Serious Wounds (3). Usable only by priests. 50 charges.

staves.name: Staff of Necromancy
staves.description: Cause Fear (2), Enervation (4), Hold Person (3), Magic Jar (6), Spectral Hand (2). Usable by evil priests or necromancer specialists.

staves.name: Staff of Power
staves.description: Usable by wizards only. Multiple functions. +2 to hit when used as weapon. Fireball, Cone of Cold, Lightning Bolt, Hold Monster, Continual Light, Globe of Invulnerability, Magic Missiles, Ray of Enfeeblement, Telekinesis. 200 charges. Can be broken as retributive strike (30d6 in 30-ft radius; wielder gets Plane Shift saving throw).

staves.name: Staff of Striking
staves.description: +3 to hit and damage. Can expend charges for +6 (2 charges) or +9 (3 charges) damage bonus. 50 charges. Usable by all classes.

staves.name: Staff of Swarming Insects
staves.description: Priest staff. Insect Plague (5), Creeping Doom (2). 50 charges.

staves.name: Staff of the Magi
staves.description: Most powerful wizard staff. All Staff of Power functions plus Conjure Elemental, Dispel Magic, Fireball, Flame Tongue attack, Hold Monster, Invisiblity, Knock, Light, Lightning Bolt, Passwall, Plane Travel, Telekinesis, Web, Whirlwind. 200 charges. Breaking causes retributive strike (50d6 in 30-ft radius).

staves.name: Staff of Thunder and Lightning
staves.description: Deafening thunder blast (3 charges), Lightning Bolt (2), Chain Lightning (4). 50 charges.

staves.name: Staff of Withering
staves.description: Touch ages target 10 years per hit. On natural 20: no save, 3d10 years. Usable by evil priests only.

staves.name: Staff of Woodlands
staves.description: Druid/ranger staff. Animate Plants (3), Barkskin (2), Call Lightning (4), Charm Animal (1), Entangle (1), Pass Without Trace (1), Speak With Animals (1), Speak With Plants (2), Wall of Thorns (4). 50 charges.

wands.name: Wand of Cold
wands.description: Cone of cold: 60 ft long, 20 ft wide at far end. 6d6 cold damage, save vs. wands for half. 100 charges.

wands.name: Wand of Enemy Detection
wands.description: Detects all hostile creatures within 60 ft regardless of invisibility or concealment. Lasts 1 round per charge. 100 charges.

wands.name: Wand of Fear
wands.description: Cone of fear: 60 ft long, 30 ft wide. All creatures in cone save vs. wands or flee for 6 rounds. 100 charges.

wands.name: Wand of Fire
wands.description: Three functions: Burning Hands (1 charge), Pyrotechnics (2), Fireball (3). Usable by wizards. 100 charges.

wands.name: Wand of Fireballs
wands.description: Cast Fireball as 6th-level wizard. 6d6 damage, 20-ft radius. Save vs. wands for half. 100 charges.

wands.name: Wand of Frost
wands.description: Cone of cold. As Wand of Cold.

wands.name: Wand of Illumination
wands.description: Faerie Fire (1 charge), Continual Light (2), Sunburst (3). 100 charges.

wands.name: Wand of Illusion
wands.description: Spectral Force per round of use. Illusion with sight, sound, smell components. Requires concentration. 100 charges.

wands.name: Wand of Lightning Bolts
wands.description: Lightning Bolt as 6th-level wizard. 6d6 damage, 60-ft bolt. Save vs. wands for half. 100 charges.

wands.name: Wand of Magic Detection
wands.description: Detect magic in 20 ft per round. 1 charge per 5 rounds. Does not identify what magic does.

wands.name: Wand of Magic Missiles
wands.description: Fires 1 magic missile per charge; one charge fires 1 missile, 2 charges fire 2, up to 5 missiles. Missiles deal 1d4+1, never miss. 100 charges.

wands.name: Wand of Metal and Mineral Detection
wands.description: Detects metal type and quantity within 30 ft. Also detects minerals and gems. 1 charge per 5 rounds.

wands.name: Wand of Monster Summoning
wands.description: Summons 1d6 monsters based on level. Each use summons one group; monsters serve for 6 rounds. 1 charge per summon.

wands.name: Wand of Negation
wands.description: Negates effects of another wand or rod pointed at target. Usable 1/round. 100 charges.

wands.name: Wand of Paralyzation
wands.description: Cone: 60 ft long, 30 ft wide. Save vs. wands or paralyzed for 5d4 rounds. 100 charges.

wands.name: Wand of Polymorphing
wands.description: As Polymorph Other spell on any touched creature. Save vs. wands negates. 100 charges.

wands.name: Wand of Secret Door and Trap Detection
wands.description: Detects all secret doors and traps within 20 ft per round. 1 charge per 5 rounds.

wands.name: Wand of Size Alteration
wands.description: Enlarges or reduces one creature. As Enlarge/Reduce spell, caster level 6. 100 charges.

wands.name: Wand of Slow Monster
wands.description: Slows up to 6 creatures as Slow spell. Save vs. wands negates. Lasts 7 rounds. 100 charges.

wands.name: Wand of Summoning
wands.description: See Monster Summoning.

wands.name: Wand of Wonder
wands.description: Random effect when activated (d100 table). Effects include slowing/aging/shrinking/enlarging/polymorphing target, lightning bolt, fireball, leaves grow on target, rain of butterflies, stinking cloud, and 15 other effects.

miscellaneous_magic.description: Wide variety of magical items usable by various classes

items.name: Amulet of Inescapable Location
items.description: Cursed. Prevents Teleport, Dimension Door, Etherealness, Astral travel, and Plane travel. Cannot be removed without Remove Curse.

items.name: Amulet of Life Protection
items.description: Soul prevented from leaving body when wearer dies; Raise Dead/Resurrection always works; Death-based spells and level drains have no permanent effect.

items.name: Amulet of the Planes
items.description: Travel between any planes with a d100 roll; failure sends user to a random plane instead.

items.name: Amulet of Proof Against Detection and Location
items.description: Immune to all Locate, Scry, ESP, Detect, and Know Alignment effects.

items.name: Arrow of Direction
items.description: Spin in palm to point toward desired thing (specified by thought) within 300 yards. 7 uses per week.

items.name: Bag of Beans
items.description: Contains 3d4 magical beans; each produces a random magical effect when planted (from fire sprouts to beanstalk to hostile creature). Chaos item.

items.name: Bag of Devouring
items.description: Cursed. Appears as Bag of Holding but devours anything put in it. Living creatures drawn in and consumed in 1d6 rounds.

items.name: Bag of Holding
items.description: Interior larger than exterior. Holds up to 10,000 GP in goods (250 lbs). Weighs 15 lbs regardless.

items.name: Bag of Tricks
items.description: Pull a fuzzy ball from the bag and throw it; becomes a random animal (see tables). Up to 10 animals, 3 per day. Animals obey for 10 minutes then disappear.

items.name: Belt of Dwarvenkind
items.description: +1 CON; infravision 60 ft; +4 saves vs. poison; understand dwarvish; +2 reaction from dwarves. If non-dwarf, 50% chance of developing dwarven personality traits.

items.name: Boots of Dancing
items.description: Cursed. Owner dances at worst possible moment (combat). -4 to AC and attacks; cannot control movement. Remove Curse needed to remove boots.

items.name: Boots of Elvenkind
items.description: Move silently at all times; no chance of being heard while walking. +20% to Move Silently (or automatic success).

items.name: Boots of Levitation
items.description: Levitate on command at will.

items.name: Boots of Speed
items.description: Double normal walking speed. After use, wearer must rest 1 turn per 6 turns of use.

items.name: Boots of Striding and Springing
items.description: Move rate 12 regardless of terrain or burden. Jump up to 30 ft horizontally, 10 ft vertically 3x/day.

items.name: Bracers of Archery
items.description: +2 to hit with any bow; +1 damage with any bow. Usable by fighters, rangers, thieves.

items.name: Bracers of Brachiation
items.description: Swing through trees like an ape. Movement 15 in forest. Usable like monkey in tree environments.

items.name: Bracers of Defense
items.description: AC improvement for classes restricted from armor (wizards, monks).

items.name: Bracers of Defenselessness
items.description: Cursed. Worsens AC by 2 when attacked; cannot be removed without Remove Curse.

items.name: Brooch of Shielding
items.description: Absorbs Magic Missile attacks. Absorbs up to 101 HP total; then becomes nonmagical.

items.name: Carpet of Flying
items.description: Flying carpet. Speed 3 (fast, 4 passengers), Speed 6 (medium, 2 passengers), or Speed 9 (slow, 1). MC: B.

items.name: Chime of Opening
items.description: Struck near a door, lid, lock, or similar: opens within 300 ft. 10 uses. Opens doors, chests, locks, secret doors.

items.name: Cloak of Arachnida
items.description: Spider Climb at will; +2 to all saves vs. web-based magic; once per day: Web spell.

items.name: Cloak of Displacement
items.description: Appears displaced 2 ft from actual location. First attack each round automatically misses. +2 to all saving throws.

items.name: Cloak of Elvenkind
items.description: Nearly invisible in natural surroundings; 90% chance to avoid notice when motionless; 60% when moving.

items.name: Cloak of Poisonousness
items.description: Cursed. Appears as beneficial cloak; when worn, user is immediately poisoned (save vs. poison at -4 or die). Remove Curse to remove.

items.name: Cloak of Protection
items.description: +1 to +5 AC and saving throw bonus.

items.name: Crystal Ball
items.description: Scry for 1 turn per use. Usable by wizards. 3 uses per day. Extended use risks possession by astral entity.

items.name: Crystal Ball with Clairaudience
items.description: As Crystal Ball but also hear at scried location.

items.name: Crystal Ball with ESP
items.description: As Crystal Ball but also read surface thoughts of those seen.

items.name: Cube of Force
items.description: Creates indestructible force cube 10 ft on a side around wielder. Various modes protect against physical attack, magic, ethereal creatures, etc.

items.name: Cube of Frost Resistance
items.description: Creates 10-ft cube immune to cold. Blocks natural cold and magical cold up to 50 points per round.

items.name: Daern's Instant Fortress
items.description: Expands to a 20-ft diameter tower, 30 ft tall in 1 round. Has arrow slits, reinforced door, stairs. Can be collapsed.

items.name: Deck of Many Things
items.description: Most powerful and dangerous miscellaneous magic item. A deck of cards; drawing results in random major effects, both beneficial and catastrophic.

cards.effect: Gain 50,000 XP and one Wishes
1-4 Wishes
+2 to any ability
Next monster defeated gives enough XP to advance a level
+6 CHA, gain a keep, +3 save vs. charms
Gain a magic weapon +1 level appropriate to class
Gain a fighter follower 4th level who is utterly loyal
25 pieces of jewelry and 50 gems appear
Soul imprisoned, body catatonic; recover only by finding soul container
Powerful devil becomes enemy forever
Instantly fight Death, a Demi-Lich; if lost, soul is forever imprisoned
-1d4+1 INT; draw another card or keep the loss
Trapped in an extradimensional space; all magic items gone
Know the answer to any one problem/question
All magic items carried disappear forever
Most trusted NPC henchman becomes enemy
Must change alignment
10,000 XP or 2 more draws from deck
-10,000 XP and must draw again (no choice)
Change one event in the last 3 days

items.name: Efreeti Bottle
items.description: Contains an efreeti. 10% chance it is hostile. If friendly, serves 101 days then departs. Can grant 3 wishes over its service.

items.name: Eyes of Charming
items.description: Crystalline lenses; creatures meeting wearer's gaze must save vs. spell at -2 or be charmed. Once per creature per day.

items.name: Eyes of Minute Seeing
items.description: See detail at tiny scale; read minute writing; spot secret doors at 5 ft (as elf); +2 to Find Traps.

items.name: Eyes of Petrification
items.description: Cursed. Function as Gorgon eyes; whoever looks at wearer (and wearer at them) must save vs. petrification or be petrified.

items.name: Figurines of Wondrous Power
items.description: Small statuettes that become real creatures on command.

types.name: Golden Lions (pair)
types.description: Each becomes a lion for 1 hour, 1x/week

types.name: Ivory Goats (3)
types.description: Each becomes a special goat with unique power (traveling, terror, or slaying)

types.name: Onyx Dog
types.description: Becomes dog with 60-ft infravision and tracking for 6 hours, 3x/week

items.name: Flask of Curses
items.description: Cursed flask releasing random curse when opened.

items.name: Gauntlets of Dexterity
items.description: Set DEX to 18 while worn.

items.name: Gauntlets of Fumbling
items.description: Cursed. Drop held items at worst possible moments. -2 to attacks.

items.name: Gauntlets of Ogre Power
items.description: STR 18/00 while worn. +3 to hit, +6 damage.

items.name: Gauntlets of Swimming and Climbing
items.description: Swim at movement rate 15; climb at movement rate 15; cannot slip or fall from climbing.

items.name: Gem of Seeing
items.description: Use as monocle to see through illusions, polymorph effects, disguises; see invisible/hidden creatures. 3 uses per day, 10 minutes each.

items.name: Girdle of Femininity/Masculinity
items.description: Cursed. Changes gender of wearer. Cannot be removed without Remove Curse or Wish.

items.name: Girdle of Giant Strength
items.description: Grants strength of a specific giant type.

items.name: Hat of Disguise
items.description: Change appearance to any humanoid of similar height/build at will, plus minor alterations. Functions as Disguise Self.

items.name: Helm of Brilliance
items.description: Flaming weapons add +1d6 fire damage; sets morale of undead. 10 prismatic spray charges; regenerate fire-based spells for wizards.

items.name: Helm of Comprehending Languages
items.description: Read any written language; understand any spoken language (not speak it).

items.name: Helm of Telepathy
items.description: Detect thoughts within 90 ft (as ESP spell). Send thoughts to detected minds. Implant suggestion once per day.

items.name: Helm of Teleportation
items.description: Teleport as spell. Usable 3 times per day.

items.name: Helm of Underwater Action
items.description: Breathe water; see clearly in water to 60 ft; move at full speed underwater.

items.name: Horseshoes of Speed
items.description: Horse wearing these horseshoes gallops at double speed.

items.name: Ioun Stones
items.description: Orbit the user's head; each type provides a specific benefit.

types.benefit: Absorbs 1-3 levels of spells cast at owner
Absorbs 2-4 levels of spells; holds 20 levels total

items.name: Instrument of the Bards
items.description: Special instruments granting bards additional spell-like powers.

types.name: Canaith Mandolin
types.effects: Cure Disease, Cure Light Wounds, Neutralize Poison, Protection from Evil, Sleep

types.name: Cli Lyre
types.effects: Animal Summoning II, Cure Blindness, Cure Serious Wounds, Slow, Stone to Flesh

types.name: Doss Lute
types.effects: Charm Person, Faerie Fire, Shillelagh, Sleep, Speak with Animals

types.name: Fochlucan Bandore
types.effects: Cure Light Wounds, Entangle, Faerie Fire, Shillelagh, Speak with Animals, Speak with Plants

types.name: Mac-Fuirmidh Cittern
types.effects: Barkskin, Cure Light Wounds, Faerie Fire, Fly, Invisibility, Levitate, Protection from Evil

types.name: Ollamh Harp
types.effects: Charm Monster, Fire Storm, Fly, Mass Suggestion, Programmed Illusion

types.name: Una's Harp
types.effects: Dispel Magic, Fly, Mass Charm, Otto's Irresistible Dance

items.name: Iron Flask
items.description: Can imprison any one extraplanar being of 24 HD or fewer. Command the trapped being to serve. 1 being held at a time.

items.name: Libram of Gainful Conjuration
items.description: Usable by chaotic good wizards only. If successfully read: +1 level. Others risk permanent INT drain.

items.name: Lyre of Building
items.description: Playing negates all damage from sounds and vibration. 30 minutes of play does work of 100 workers for 3 days.

items.name: Manual of Bodily Health
items.description: Reading takes 48 hours; +1 CON permanently. Can only benefit any creature once.

items.name: Manual of Gainful Exercise
items.description: Reading takes 48 hours; +1 STR permanently. Can only benefit any creature once.

items.name: Manual of Golems
items.description: Instructions for creating one type of golem. Must have crafting skills. Wrong class reading it: 5d6 damage.

items.name: Manual of Puissant Skill at Arms
items.description: Usable by fighters only. Reading takes 48 hours; +1 to hit and damage with all weapons permanently.

items.name: Manual of Quickness of Action
items.description: Reading takes 48 hours; +1 DEX permanently.

items.name: Manual of Stealthy Pilfering
items.description: Usable by thieves only. Reading takes 48 hours; +15% to all thief skills.

items.name: Medallion of ESP
items.description: ESP in 30 ft, 3 turns per day. 30% chance of random thought broadcast to all nearby.

items.name: Mirror of Life Trapping
items.description: Anyone seeing their reflection save vs. spell at -4 or be trapped inside (12 cells). Those inside age 1 year per month.

items.name: Mirror of Mental Prowess
items.description: Clairaudience/clairvoyance anywhere seen in mirror; answers one question 1/week; teleport to place shown 1/week.

items.name: Mirror of Opposition
items.description: Creates evil duplicate of any creature looking into it. Duplicate seeks to slay the original. Duplicate disappears when original destroyed.

items.name: Necklace of Adaptation
items.description: Breathe freely in any environment (underwater, vacuum, toxic gas). No spells, potions, or gases affect breathing.

items.name: Necklace of Fireballs
items.description: Beads that can be thrown as Fireball. Comes in 7 types with different quantities. Range 70 yards, 2d6 to 10d6 damage by bead type.

items.name: Necklace of Missiles
items.description: Spherical beads that become Magic Missiles when thrown. Range 70 yards; variable number of missiles.

items.name: Necklace of Prayer Beads
items.description: Prayer bead necklace for clerics. Beads include: Bead of Blessing (+1 to attack/damage/saves for 1 hour), Bead of Healing (Cure Light Wounds), Bead of Karma (cast spells at +4 levels), Bead of Summons (summon deity's servant), Bead of Wind Walking.

items.name: Nolzur's Marvelous Pigments
items.description: Painted objects become real 3D objects. Painting a door creates a real door; painting food creates real food, etc. 4d4 pots.

items.name: Orb of Dragonkind
items.description: Command all dragons of a specific type within range. Summon dragons. 1 orb per dragon type (5 total). Dragonkind can sense the orb.

items.name: Pearl of Power
items.description: Wizards can memorize one extra spell per day of the indicated level.

items.name: Pearl of Wisdom
items.description: +1 WIS permanently. Usable only by priests.

items.name: Periapt of Health
items.description: Immune to all diseases including magical. Immune to lycanthropy infection. +4 to saves vs. poison.

items.name: Periapt of Proof Against Poison
items.description: Completely immune to all poisons.

items.name: Periapt of Wound Closure
items.description: Bleeding wounds close automatically; stabilize at negative HP (no bleed-out); natural healing is doubled.

items.name: Philosophers Stone
items.description: Transmute base metals to silver or gold. Also cures all diseases, neutralizes all poisons, and can restore dead to life as Raise Dead.

items.name: Phylactery of Faithfulness
items.description: Alert wearer before any action that would cause alignment change. Usable only by priests.

items.name: Pipes of Haunting
items.description: All within 30 ft who hear the music save vs. spell at -2 or flee in terror for 1d4+1 rounds. 3 uses per day, 6 minutes each.

items.name: Pipes of the Sewers
items.description: Play to summon 3d6 rat swarms or 1d3 wererats in 2d4 minutes.

items.name: Portable Hole
items.description: Circular black cloth 6 ft diameter; unfolds to become extradimensional hole 10 ft deep. Lightweight; can hold many things. If placed inside a Bag of Holding: both destroyed, sucking all contents to Astral Plane.

items.name: Quaal's Feather Token
items.description: Each is a magical one-use feather.

types.effect: Holds ship in place regardless of current or wind
Carries messages up to 100 miles; delivers in 1d4 hours
Creates wind for sailing ship, 1 hour
Creates +3 whip wielded by invisible force

items.name: Rope of Climbing
items.description: Rope of 60 ft; climbs, knots, and secures on command. Can hold 3000 lbs. Commands: climb, knot, unknot, tie, untie.

items.name: Rope of Entanglement
items.description: On command, rope shoots out to entangle up to 6 man-sized creatures; STR 20 or Dispel Magic required to free them.

items.name: Scarab of Protection
items.description: +1 to saves; immunity to energy drain; reflects 1 harmful 1st-5th level spell back on caster per day. 12 charges total.

items.name: Sphere of Annihilation
items.description: Self-sustaining ball of nothingness; destroys all matter it contacts. Controlled by PSI (INT + WIS vs. 15). If control fails: sphere moves toward nearest creature.

items.name: Stone of Controlling Earth Elementals
items.description: Summon 12 HD earth elemental 1/day. Elemental serves for 1 hour.

items.name: Stone of Good Luck (Luckstone)
items.description: +1 to all saves and proficiency checks while carried. +1 to all attack rolls.

items.name: Tome of Clear Thought
items.description: Reading (48 hours): +1 INT permanently. Book disappears after reading.

items.name: Tome of Leadership and Influence
items.description: Reading (48 hours): +1 CHA permanently. Book disappears after reading.

items.name: Tome of Understanding
items.description: Reading (48 hours): +1 WIS permanently. Book disappears after reading.

items.name: Vacuous Grimoire
items.description: Cursed spellbook. Reading: INT and WIS permanently reduced by 2d4. Only a Wish can undo this.

items.name: Well of Many Worlds
items.description: Cloth sheet that creates a portal to another world/plane when placed on the ground. Random destination. Cannot be controlled.

items.name: Wind Fan
items.description: Creates Gust of Wind once per day. Can also create a 60-ft cone of air for 1 round doing minor damage.

magic_armor_and_shields.description: Magical armor provides AC bonuses in addition to base AC. Bonuses stack with armor type.

armor_bonuses.plus_1_to_5: Each +1 improves AC by 1 (reduces AC number by 1)
armor_bonuses.cursed_minus: Cursed armor worsen AC; cannot be removed without Remove Curse

special_armors.name: Armor of Blending
special_armors.description: Appears as normal clothing to casual inspection. At will: change appearance of armor to any other armor type, or appear as normal clothing.

special_armors.name: Armor of Command
special_armors.description: Grants +2 CHA; allies within 360 ft gain +1 morale bonus; enemies within 60 ft -1 morale.

special_armors.name: Armor of Etherealness
special_armors.description: On command: wearer and armor become ethereal. Can be used once per day for up to 1 turn.

special_armors.name: Armor of Gleaming
special_armors.description: Self-cleaning; always appears polished and maintained. No rust or corrosion.

special_armors.name: Armor of Missile Attraction
special_armors.description: Cursed. Ranged attacks are drawn to the wearer; all ranged attacks within 60 ft automatically target the wearer.

special_armors.name: Armor of Rage
special_armors.description: Cursed. Wearer becomes increasingly enraged, attacking all nearby creatures after 1d4 rounds. Cannot remove without Remove Curse.

special_armors.name: Elfchain
special_armors.description: Elven chainmail. Move silently as leather armor. Usable by elves only (or all with DM permission).

special_armors.name: Shield +1 to +5
special_armors.description: Magic shield; provides stated bonus to AC in addition to base shield bonus.

special_armors.name: Shield of Missile Attraction
special_armors.description: Cursed. As Armor of Missile Attraction. Cannot be discarded without Remove Curse.

magic_weapons.description: Magic weapons provide attack and damage bonuses; some have special properties

basic_bonuses.description: +1 to +5 weapons add their bonus to both attack roll and damage
basic_bonuses.hit_required: Some creatures can only be hit by magical weapons (+1 or better required for many)

special_weapons.name: Arrow of Slaying
special_weapons.description: Instantly kills the targeted creature type on a hit; save vs. death magic negates. Various types for different creature categories.

special_weapons.name: Axe of the Dwarvish Lords
special_weapons.description: Legendary dwarven artifact. +3 battle axe; in hands of dwarf lord: +6 to hit and damage vs. giants and evil non-dwarves. Additional powers.

special_weapons.name: Bow of Distance
special_weapons.description: Doubles range increments of the bow.

special_weapons.name: Dancing Sword
special_weapons.description: On command, fights independently for 4 rounds; attacks each round at user's THAC0. Returns to hand after 4 rounds.

special_weapons.name: Defender
special_weapons.description: +5 sword that can transfer its bonus to AC. Total bonus must be split between attack and defense (AC).

special_weapons.name: Dwarven Thrower
special_weapons.description: +3 warhammer; +3 to hit and 2d6+3 damage normally. Usable by dwarf only: throw up to 60 ft and it returns.

special_weapons.name: Flame Tongue
special_weapons.description: +1 longsword; on command: flaming blade. +2 vs. regenerating creatures; +3 vs. cold-based creatures; +4 vs. undead, plants.

special_weapons.name: Frost Brand
special_weapons.description: +3 sword; in cold: glows blue. Extinguishes non-magical fire in 10-ft radius. +6 vs. fire-using or fire-dwelling creatures.

special_weapons.name: Holy Avenger
special_weapons.description: +5 holy sword; paladins only. Paladins dispel evil with it (as a Dispel Magic); non-paladins treat as +2 weapon only.

special_weapons.name: Javelin of Lightning
special_weapons.description: When thrown: becomes 4d6 lightning bolt, 60 ft range. Destroyed after throwing.

special_weapons.name: Javelin of Piercing
special_weapons.description: Unerring aim: +6 to hit, 1d6+3 damage. Can shoot around corners if path is known. Flies up to 90 ft. One use.

special_weapons.name: Knife/Dagger +1 to +5
special_weapons.description: Standard bonus dagger.

special_weapons.name: Luck Blade
special_weapons.description: +1 to +3 blade; once per day: Luck spell (+1 luck on rolls); contains 1-4 Wishes (one available per adventure day).

special_weapons.name: Mace of Disruption
special_weapons.description: +1 mace; undead hit by it must save vs. spell at -4 or be instantly destroyed (as if Turned by high-level cleric).

special_weapons.name: Mace of Smiting
special_weapons.description: +3 mace vs. all creatures; +6 vs. constructs; on natural 20 vs. construct: destroy it (save vs. spell negates).

special_weapons.name: Nine Lives Stealer
special_weapons.description: +2 sword; on natural 20 vs. targets with fewer than 8 HP: instant death (save vs. death magic negates). Up to 9 lives stolen; then becomes +2 sword only.

special_weapons.name: Oathbow
special_weapons.description: Elven bow. When oath sworn against enemy: +3 to hit and damage that enemy; -1 to hit all others until enemy is dead.

special_weapons.name: Short Sword of Quickness
special_weapons.description: +2 short sword; wielder attacks first in a round regardless of initiative or Dex bonus.

special_weapons.name: Spear of Backbiting
special_weapons.description: Cursed. Returns to strike its thrower instead of the target. Cannot be discarded without Remove Curse.

special_weapons.name: Staff-Mace
special_weapons.description: +1 to +3; functions as quarterstaff or mace depending on which end is used.

special_weapons.name: Sun Blade
special_weapons.description: +2 sword normally; +4 vs. evil creatures; +6 vs. undead, vampires; acts as Sunray 1/day (7d6, blinds those failing save).

special_weapons.name: Sword of Life Stealing
special_weapons.description: +2 sword; on natural 20: steal 1 energy level from victim (as energy drain). Victim loses levels permanently.

special_weapons.name: Sword of Sharpness
special_weapons.description: +3 longsword or two-handed sword; on natural 20: severs a limb (roll for which). Usable only by fighters/paladins/rangers.

special_weapons.name: Sword of the Planes
special_weapons.description: +1 normally; +4 on Outer Planes; +5 vs. extradimensional creatures. Provides plane-specific resistances.

special_weapons.name: Sword of Wounding
special_weapons.description: +1 sword; wounds cannot be healed naturally or by Cure spells (Regeneration or Heal required). Wounds continue to bleed for 1 HP/round.

special_weapons.name: Throwing Hammer
special_weapons.description: +1 to +3 hammer; returns to thrower's hand after each throw.

special_weapons.name: Trident of Fish Command
special_weapons.description: Command fish within 60 ft; 3 charges per day; lasts 1 turn per use.

special_weapons.name: Trident of Warning
special_weapons.description: Vibrates and glows when aquatic creatures intend to attack within 240 ft. Always initiative advantage in water.

special_weapons.name: Vorpal Blade
special_weapons.description: +3 sword; on natural 20: automatically severs target's head (instant death). Usable only by fighters/paladins/rangers.

special_weapons.name: Warpicks of Slaying
special_weapons.description: +3 vs. specific creature type; +6 vs. and may instantly kill that creature type.

artifacts_and_relics.description: Unique items of immense power. Usually cannot be destroyed by conventional means. Each has unique powers and often has side effects or drawbacks.

examples.name: Axe of the Dwarvish Lords
examples.description: Legendary dwarven artifact; +6 vs. giants for dwarf lords

examples.name: Crown of Might
examples.description: Gives STR 25 and various combat bonuses to lawful warriors

examples.name: Eye of Vecna
examples.description: Must replace one of your eyes to use; grants true sight, See Invisible, various powers; slowly corrupts alignment

examples.name: Hand of Vecna
examples.description: Must sever your hand to graft on; tremendous power but soul slowly consumed by Vecna

examples.name: Orbs of Dragonkind
examples.description: 5 orbs, each commands a type of dragon; seeked by dragons who want to destroy them

examples.name: Queen Ehlonna's Acorns
examples.description: Legendary nature artifacts; create natural features

examples.name: Sword of Kas
examples.description: Evil intelligent sword that once belonged to Vecna's lieutenant; seeks to destroy Vecna but corrupts wielder toward evil
